AddressInfo.Title: Innogy Public Charging Station(AC).
AddressInfo.AddressLine2: @ the end of parking lot @ the end of the street adjacent to bus station.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access,except 1ce per year the parking lot is blocked by a lunapark,usually 2 weeks in september.

GeneralComments: Charging station without a display.Connect the cable,then approach Your RFID card to the sensor marked @ surface,choose the sensor closer to the side,U connected the cable,when authenthication succeeds,the LED above the socket changes color to blue. Red means error. Green means connected vehicle but not charging(be4 authenthication).
